text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of Narita<n>Taishin's journey
to take on the<n>Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
To show off her amazing final sprint,<n>and to get
the better of all those who<n>underestimate her...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: We must first work together towards<n>her debut.
